title: Rotating Pomni
description: Rotating Pomni is a unique platform puzzle game where you rotate the world to guide Pomni to his lost stars. This is a great puzzle game with 40 challenge levels, push your logical brain abilities to the limit! Product feature bullets: • Grimace on board! • 40 different levels! • Very Fun for children! • Brain training for whole family! • Cute graphics! • Precise gameplay!
instructions: Mouse click or tap to play
